name: Marathon athlete mid-build, 14 weeks out
description: Intermediate marathoner deep in the Build phase. Needs threshold + MP work woven in without compromising long-run quality. No lifting interference — pure run focus.
must_have: One long run per week progressing from ~26km to ~32km over the block (with one deload week reducing it)
One threshold/tempo session per week (e.g. 4-6km @ threshold or cruise intervals)
Marathon-pace work integrated into a long run at least once (e.g. last 8-12km @ MP)
A deload week with volume reduced 30-40% while keeping at least one quality session
≥80% of weekly run volume at easy/Z2 pace
Lifting limited to upper-body or full-body with no heavy legs 48h before quality runs
must_not_have: Three or more quality sessions in the same week
Heavy lower-body lift the day before a long run, tempo, or interval session
Marathon-pace or threshold work omitted entirely
